name: dendrite-wiki-mcp
description: Project-local Dendrite Wiki MCP integration for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Project wiki, memory, and handoff MCP tools
interface.longDescription: Loads the local Dendrite Wiki MCP server and companion workflow skill so Codex can use project wiki context, memory, handoffs, lint, and documentation maintenance tools from this repository.
defaultPrompt: Load Dendrite wiki context for this repo
